channel.title: Eboostr on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Eboostr on Have an average day :|

item.title: eBoostr Review
item.description: Well I ran some benchmarks over the weekend and found that Borderlands sits at 25+ fps when I use this&# 133; eboostr Color me shocked! I thought that this would be yet another bit of snake oil. I went into this testing with thinking, Gee these people are just selling snake oil.. what is this going to do that readyboost won&# 146;t? Without using eboostr I would get about 10fps after I installed the General Knoxx DLC.
